title: lamyra diacantha
intro: Lamyra diacantha, also known as Diacantha lamyra, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to tropical Africa, valued for its medicinal properties. The leaves and stems of Lamyra diacantha contain alkaloids and flavonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties.
